item.title: It’s being represented in the media as if this is a random attack as if America hasn’t surrounded Iran for the past two decades ...
item.description:
It’s being represented in the media as if this is a random attack as if America hasn’t surrounded Iran for the past two decades in aggressive military bases

item.title: Whenever the people that refuse to care and consistently profit off of extraordinary violations of human rights, tell you they’r...
item.description:
Whenever the people that refuse to care and consistently profit off of extraordinary violations of human rights, tell you they’re doing something for human rights, you either have to be desperate or incompetent to believe them

There’s a much longer history that would be really interesting to go through, but it is very effective with the even the manifest destiny picture that everyone kind of points to being a classically attractive person#greenscreenvideo

item.title: ￼ when your entire economy is built on appearing as a safe stable place to invest the empires capital, then when that is demonst...
item.description:
￼ when your entire economy is built on appearing as a safe stable place to invest the empires capital, then when that is demonstrated not to be true you get really scared
